mnemonics: ICT's G.R.E.E.N. Impact: Growth (of ICT), Resource Consumption, Environmental Footprint, Energy Use, Need for Sustainability
keyPoints: The rapid growth of ICT has significantly increased its environmental footprint through resource consumption and energy use.
The manufacturing, use, and disposal of ICT devices contribute to e-waste, carbon emissions, and resource depletion.
This environmental impact is the core driver for the emergence of Green IT, which seeks to make ICT more sustainable throughout its lifecycle.
commonMistakes: Assuming the main goal of Green IT is only to reduce energy use in data centers, ignoring the full lifecycle (manufacturing, disposal).
Believing that digital services like cloud computing and streaming are carbon-neutral simply because they are intangible.
